ApllyMail-applyConfirm: The application has been successfully submitted.
statusResetSuccess: The application status has been reset
confirmResetStatus: Are you sure you want to reset the status of this application? The application will be removed from the accepted applications list.
ApplicationConsidered-applyConsidered: We would like to inform you that your application is currently under review. You can expect to be contacted soon.
inertiaDateApply: The date of birth field is required.
inertiaDateFormatApply: The date format must be yyyy-mm-dd
inertiaDateFormatApply120: The date of birth cannot be earlier than 120 years ago.
inertiaCityLetters: The city may contain only letters and spaces.
CvRate: You can submit only one application every 24 hours
cannotResetNonAcceptedApplication: Cannot reset the status of an application that is not accepted
extraRegister: If you want to increase your chances of applying, create an account.
Social-info: Customer **:name** with email **:email** selected the Social Promotion service
Project-info: Customer **:name** with email **:email** sent a request to design a banner
Mail-submitted-line1: Thank you for submitting your application.
Mail-submitted-line2: Your application has been successfully sent and will soon be forwarded for verification.
Mail-submitted-line3: We will keep you informed about any changes in your application status.
Mail-processing-line1: We would like to inform you that your application is currently under review.
Mail-processing-line2: We are currently analyzing your submitted application.
Mail-processing-line3: If you proceed to the next stage of recruitment, we will contact you soon.
Mail-accepted-line1: Congratulations! Your application has been preliminarily evaluated positively.
Mail-accepted-line2: At this stage, it meets our recruitment expectations.
Mail-accepted-line3: Please be patient — we will contact you soon regarding the next steps.
Mail-rejected-line1: Thank you for participating in the recruitment process and for your interest in our offer.
Mail-rejected-line2: Unfortunately, at this stage we cannot offer you further participation in the recruitment process.
Mail-rejected-line3: We encourage you to apply for other opportunities that may appear in the future.
Mail-guest-subject: Your application has been submitted! Increase your chances of success
Mail-guest-line1: Thank you for submitting your application through Work4you.global. Your application has been successfully forwarded to the employer.
Mail-guest-line2: We noticed that you do not yet have an account in our portal. Why is it worth creating one?
Mail-guest-point1: Greater credibility: Users with a complete profile are chosen more often by recruiters.
Mail-guest-point2: Faster contact: Employers can review your experience directly in the system.
Mail-guest-point3: Everything in one place: You can track the status of your applications and manage your documents.
Mail-guest-footer: Registration takes only a moment and will significantly bring you closer to getting your dream job.
CorrectionMail-line1: A correction has been issued for invoice :number.
CorrectionMail-line2: You can find the correction in PDF format in the attachment or in your account in the finance section.
